title: 🔴 A Runic Trap Triggers!
description: Tap the runes in the correct order to disarm the trap. Beware the timer!
clue: Carved into the wall: 'Fire melts Ice, Ice freezes Water, Water douses Fire... Strike them from weakest to strongest.'
successText: The runes pulse green and shatter safely into dust!
failText: Wrong combination! The runes explode, triggering an alarm.

questions.clue: What has roots as nobody sees, is taller than trees, up, up it goes, and yet never grows?
What has keys but can't open locks?

title: ⚡ Quick Reflexes
description: Tap the runes in numerical order.
clue: Speed is the essence of survival.
